forgekit-router.description: ForgeKit Runtime Router — deterministic intent-to-skill routing. Exposes route_intent (MANDATORY first tool), route_status, route_log.

args: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && GITNEXUS_SKIP_OPTIONAL_GRAMMARS=1 npm_config_cache=/tmp/gitnexus-npm-cache-rc npx -y gitnexus@rc mcp
gitnexus.description: GitNexus graph-powered code intelligence. Query indexed repositories via MCP.
